creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Following the xorg-server upgrade, I started getting many
	errors.  I can ignore most of the errors, such as the unending
	"Generic Event Extension" errors, but gmplayer just stopped
	working for some reason.  I initially thought it was a font
	problem, because it could no longer read the luxirri.ttf file,
	but whne I removed my local .mplayer directory to reset
	everything, it started producing this error:

zircon.zircon.seattle.wa.us$ gmplayer
MPlayer 1.0rc2-4.2.1 (C) 2000-2007 MPlayer Team
CPU: AMD Athlon(tm) 64 Processor 3800+ (Family: 15, Model: 47, Stepping: 0)
CPUflags:  MMX: 1 MMX2: 1 3DNow: 1 3DNow2: 1 SSE: 1 SSE2: 1
Compiled with runtime CPU detection.
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
Xlib:  extension "Generic Event Extension" missing on display ":0.0".
[ws] Error in display.
[ws]  Error code: 10 ( BadAccess (attempt to access private resource denied) )
[ws]  Request code: 146
[ws]  Minor code: 1
[ws]  Modules: (NULL)

      mplayer seems to run, but gmplayer does not work.
